case_title: PEDRO MARTINEZ VS. RODOLFO P. NEBREDA, JR et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED AUG-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NEBREDA, JR, RODOLFO P.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FOR PROGRESS REPORT IS "GRANTED".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED AUG-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PINKO, MARIO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-09-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE IS CONTINUED PENDING THE PARTIES SETTLEMENT ON THE FOLLOWING TERMS: (1) PLAINTIFF WITHDRAWS HIS PREVIOUS 60 DAY NOTICE TO TERMINATE TENANCY; (2) PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE DEFENDANT WITH A NEW, NINETY DAY NOTICE TO TERMINATE TENANCY; (3) IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE SUBJECT PREMISES BY DECEMBER 31, 2008, PLAINTIFF AGREES TO WAIVE ALL RENT DUE AND LEGAL COSTS INCURRED; (4) DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT SHALL BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED IN CIVIL CODE 1950.5 AND OTHER PERTINENT STATUTES. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT NEBREDA, JR, RODOLFO P. NEBREDA, BETH PINKO, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED FROM JAN-09-2009 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON DEC-03-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. *(THE CASE IS SET FOR HEARING ON THE STATUS OF THE PENDING SETTLEMENT. ALL PARTIES SHALL APPEAR.)*
